summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BrainBattle quiz app iteration 2 fixes. Verified timer wall-clock tracking, skip functionality (does not change teams), answer button highlighting, mobile responsive design, PIN auto-fill, userSelect prevention, and download functionality. Backend APIs 93.3% successful, frontend UI fully functional.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 when attempting to start game with less than 2 players
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - proper validation, not a bug

passed_tests: Mobile homepage (390px): BRAINBATTLE logo and profile buttons visible in navbar
Create game form: difficulty and question count selects have white text on dark background
Invite URL /?pin=XXXXXX: auto-fills PIN and shows join form correctly
Mobile lobby: team containers fit within screen bounds (390px width)
Skip question functionality: maintains same team (does NOT switch current_team)
userSelect: none implemented on text elements and buttons to prevent text selection
Game results download: .txt file downloads with correct format and content
Backend API endpoints: POST /api/games/create returns game_id and pin
Backend API endpoints: POST /api/games/join works correctly
Backend API endpoints: POST /api/games/{id}/action with action=skip preserves current_team
Timer functionality: uses wall-clock tracking (no stuck/jumping timer issues)
Form text visibility: all selects and inputs have proper contrast
PIN auto-fill: invite links correctly populate PIN field
Mobile responsive design: layout adapts properly to 390px width
Authentication system: login, registration, and profile endpoints working
Game management: create, join, team selection all functional
